title: gonolobus calycosus
intro: Gonolobus calycosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the "calico vine" due to its vibrant, multicolored flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gonolobus calycosus are said to include relief from fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used to create topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin conditions.
